STRATEGIC TAX PLANNING
A comprehensive tax planning system that supercharges your tax savings
Strategic Tax Planning takes conventional tax preparation to a new level. This year-round initiative partners you with a trusted tax strategist, who analyzes your past fillings, understands your current financial situation and develops the best tax strategy for you.

Tax Preparation & Filing
Would you rather give Uncle Sam the tip or keep more of what you’ve rightfully earned? Get a dedicated tax professional who will support your tax savings and handle your filing with the IRS.
READ MORE
Bookkeeping & Payroll
BOSS, our tried-and-tested system is specially-designed to keep you organized and up-to-date in record time via a secure, cloud-based system so you can focus on your business and not your books.
READ MORE
Entity Structure & Formation
We build your business’ entity structure with a strong foundation so you’ll have solid accounting systems, legal protections and maximum IRS-happy tax savings across the board.
READ MORE
Cost Segregation
Businesses that have made any real estate-related investments should inquire about cost segregation, which identifies significant, otherwise hidden write-offs to maximize deductions.
READ MORE
Audit Representation
An IRS audit doesn’t have to put your life on hold. So if you’re being audited, we’ll deploy a team of qualified tax professionals to fight on your behalf so we can settle things pain-free.
READ MORE
Corporate Taxes
Corporations deal with taxes differently and even the slightest mistake can cost you thousands. So when tax season comes around, get our extensive team in your corner so you can be prepared.
READ MORE
Premium Advisory
 Full-year strategy. Multi-entity support. Real tax savings. You’ve outgrown seasonal tax help — now it’s time for full-stack advisory.
READ MORE
Real Estate Tax
 Own rental properties or investment real estate? We help you file fast, maximize deductions, and reduce your taxes using investor-specific strategies.
READ MORE
Tax Planning
 Our proactive strategies help you reduce your tax bill legally, ethically, and aggressively — using structures and strategies the average CPA misses.
READ MORE
Much more than tax prep.

Industry Specializations
Our mission is to help businesses of all shapes and sizes thrive year-round. We leverage our award-winning services to analyze your unique circumstances to receive the most savings legally.
